description: Polish and wire QuantAds - wire real API via existing api-client.ts + React Query, apply @quant/brand system (already partially integrated), add Framer Motion spring animations, loading/empty/error/success states everywhere, responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, performance, accessibility.
steps: 1. Verify @quant/brand is already in package.json and tsconfig.json (it is). Ensure brand imports work correctly
2. Update src/app/globals.css to align with brand tokens. Use quantads app color (#059669) as --brand-app-color. Ensure dark mode matches brand dark theme
3. Update src/app/layout.tsx: import quantads config from @quant/brand, set brand icon from brand package, theme-color meta tag

4. Update src/hooks/useCampaign.ts: refactor from manual useState/useEffect to React Query hooks. Use @tanstack/react-query useMutation for CRUD. Wire to existing api-client.ts methods. Remove manual loading/error state - let React Query handle them. Add optimistic updates for status changes
5. Update src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts: convert to React Query. Wire to api-client analytics endpoints. Proper stale time for analytics data (longer cache since metrics don't change instantly)
6. Update src/services/api-client.ts: ensure HttpClient pattern matches @quant/api-client conventions. Add proper error handling consistent with brand error patterns

7. Update src/app/page.tsx (dashboard): add Framer Motion spring stagger for metric cards. Add spring entrance for campaign rows. Proper empty state with EmptyStateIllustration from shared-ui. Loading skeleton states
8. Update src/app/campaigns/page.tsx: spring list animations, loading/empty/error states, responsive grid
9. Update src/app/analytics/page.tsx: animated chart entrance, loading states with skeletons, responsive layout
10. Update src/app/audiences/page.tsx: spring animations, loading/empty/error states
11. Update src/components/CampaignCard.tsx: spring scale on hover/press, status badge with brand semantic colors, 44px tap target
12. Update src/components/CampaignWizard.tsx: spring step transitions, form validation with error/success states, brand-themed buttons
13. Update src/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx: spring entrance animation, responsive sizing, dark mode colors
14. Update src/components/AudienceBuilder.tsx, BudgetOptimizer.tsx, CreativePreview.tsx, PlacementSelector.tsx: spring animations, proper states, brand colors
15. Update src/components/ABTestResults.tsx, AuctionViewer.tsx, FunnelChart.tsx: data visualization with brand colors, dark mode support, spring animations
16. Update src/pages/ files (billing, brand-safety, create-campaign, creative-studio, creatives, fraud, pixels): brand theme, spring animations, loading/error states, responsive
17. Ensure responsive 360-1440px, dark mode, 44px tap targets, keyboard navigation throughout
18. Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantads lint to verify
acceptance_criteria: pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quantads lint passes with zero errors
@quant/brand is imported and used throughout (motion springs, app config, theme colors)
All hooks converted to React Query - zero manual useState/useEffect for server state
API calls wired through existing api-client.ts to real backend
Framer Motion spring animations on dashboard, campaign list, charts, forms
Dark mode fully functional with brand dark theme colors
All interactive elements have 44px minimum tap targets and proper aria attributes
